case_title: PEACOCK JEWELERS INC. VS BORGES, PORFIRIO MR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEACOCK JEWELERS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORGES, PORFIRIO MR. $1,579.57 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,615.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $374.34 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $745.12 ACCRUED INTEREST, $7.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BORGES, PORFIRIO MR.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BORGES, PORFIRIO MR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,579.57 FILED BY PEACOCK JEWELERS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BORGES, PORFIRIO MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01
